channel.title: Llms on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Llms on Arrans github.io

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models.

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 18 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI 🔗 https://microsoft.github.io/generative-ai-for-beginners/

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: bionic-gpt/bionic-gpt
item.description: BionicGPT is an on-premise replacement for ChatGPT, offering the advantages of Generative AI while maintaining strict data confidentiality
